◎简　　介  

　　Decameroticus is a 1972 film directed by Pier Giorgio Ferretti.Inspired by tales of Boccaccio, Aretino and Bandello, it is divided into five episodes, in which the main theme is that of the cuckolded husband.In the episode The cucumber Ciccillo, the husband becomes beak trusting that a cucumber, peddled by the magician and healer Ciccillo, as a panacea for everything female, ...
